name: Scalarr
description: ML-powered mobile ad fraud detection platform for UA teams to refund fraudulent installs and optimize ROAS.

seo.title: Scalarr — Mobile Attribution / MMP
seo.meta_description: Scalarr: ML-powered mobile ad fraud detection platform for UA teams to refund fraudulent installs and optimize ROAS.

when_to_use: Detecting fraudulent installs in mobile UA campaigns
Claiming refunds on fraudulent CPI spend from ad networks
ML-powered ROAS protection for iOS and Android UA teams

pros: Refund workflows for fraudulent installs built in
cons: Not a full MMP — runs alongside one
Coverage narrower than HUMAN or DoubleVerify
Smaller team and slower product cadence
review.verdict: Focused mobile fraud specialist that is useful for UA teams, but it is a complement to an MMP.
review.best_for: Mobile UA teams wanting dedicated ML fraud detection and install refund workflows.
review.not_for: Teams that want fraud bundled into a single MMP contract.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Custom/contact sales alone is not peak-lock evidence
